key_insights: Why it matters: The Laguna S 2.1 model is cheaper than Deepseek v4 Flash and better than Deepseek v4 Pro, indicating a potential shift in the market towards more affordable and competitive AI models.

What changed: The release of Laguna S 2.1 marks a significant development in the AI landscape, offering a more cost-effective alternative to existing models like Deepseek v4 Flash and Deepseek v4 Pro.
What to watch: The performance of Laguna S 2.1 against other models and its impact on the AI market will be closely monitored to understand its potential to disrupt the industry.

sources.title: Laguna S 2.1 Released: Cheaper than Deepseek v4 Flash, Better than V4 Pro"

cards.summary: Laguna S 2.1 is a 118B-A8B model targeting local inference on high-memory systems, with reported benchmark scores of 70.2% on Terminal-Bench 2.1, 78.5% on SWE-bench Multilingual, 59.4% on SWE-Bench Pro, 40.4% on DeepSWE, 46.2% on SWE Atlas Codebase Q&A, and 49.7% on Toolathlon Verified.
